articles.title: UFC 326: Holloway vs. Oliveira 2 media day live stream | Wed. @ 2:30 p.m. E.T
articles.description: Before UFC 326 on Saturday, main card fighters, including headliners Max Holloway and Charles Oliveira, will speak to reporters at media day from Meta APEX in Las Vegas. Participants: Max Holloway – UFC BMF champion Charles Oliveira – No. 3 UFC lightweight Caio Borralho – No. 7 UFC middleweight Reinier de Ridder – No. 8 UFC middleweight Rob Font – No. 13 UFC bantamweight Raul Rosas Jr. – UFC bantamweight Drew Dober - UFC lightweight Michael Johnson - UFC lightweight Gregory Rodrigues - No. 13 UFC middleweight Brunno Ferreira - No. 15 UFC middleweight Cody Garbrandt - UFC bantamweight Xiao Long - UFC bantamweight Donte Johnson - UFC middleweight Dusko Todorovic - UFC middleweight Be sure to subscribe to receive updates when we post new content: https://www.youtube.com/@MMAJunkieOfficial?sub_confirmation=1 For the latest UFC and MMA news: https://mmajunkie.usatoday.com Part of the USA TODAY network: http://www.usatoday.com #ufc326 #MaxHolloway #CharlesOliveira

articles.title: SC Featured: Lady Mir
articles.description: On the mat, Bella Mir is a triple threat. She practices wrestling, jiu-jitsu, and MMA — which she says is her destiny. In her corner is her father Frank, a two-time UFC heavyweight champion, and Dana White, who has helped guide her journey in combat sports from the very beginning. SC Featured tells her story as this year, she’s aiming to take home the first NCAA women’s wrestling title, which would serve as the next milestone on her path to MMA stardom. ✔️ Subscribe to ESPN Unlimited: https://plus.espn.com/ #ESPN
